name: the welcome bundle
shortDescription: a snuggle bunny, a calming candle, and a card you write the words for.
longDescription: made for the awkward in-between of 'congrats' and 'i don't know what to bring'. one rainbow snuggle bunny, one lavender haze candle, one hand-written card with whatever you want it to say. everything tucked into a cotton drawstring pouch — ready to gift without wrapping.

name: settle in
shortDescription: a candle trio and an hourglass for the new place.
longDescription: for the friend who just moved. an aroma bliss candle trio and a glass hourglass for the new shelf. comes in a cotton drawstring with a hand-written 'happy new home' card. they'll cry. probably.

name: the small joy
shortDescription: one rose keychain, a thank-you card, wrapped in cotton ribbon.
longDescription: the smallest thing we sell, made for arriving on a tuesday with no occasion. one everbloom rose keychain that never wilts, wrapped in cotton ribbon with a hand-written note that just says hi.
